backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages services (CRUD operations) and business info for Bodyshape Fitness, includes blob storage mixin and uses Map for service storage with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: replacing the French Bulldog image with cardio equipment in ImageGallery.tsx and updating the Home.tsx hero background with the 20 Year Anniversary image.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, styles, and data files for the Bodyshape Fitness application with updated branding and location details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with neutral grayscale theme (no red accent colors despite comments mentioning red).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Bodyshape Fitness personal training in Dallas, TX, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home (/) and Locations (/locations) pages wrapped in Layout component.
Audio player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists preferences to localStorage and plays Bensound workout music in a fixed bottom-right card.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Gallery component displaying 12 facility images including cardio equipment (replacing French Bulldog), with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged views in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header navigation, mobile menu toggle, logo, and links to Home/Locations pages. Includes BackgroundMusic component and renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying gym location details (name, address, phone, hours) with icons for each field and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Section component that renders a grid of customer review cards with star ratings, review text, reviewer name, and date from imported reviews data.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Static data file exporting an array of six 5-star customer reviews with reviewer names, ratings, review text, and dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor with authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind imports, custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors (including red accent brand colors), and font definitions for Inter and Bebas Neue.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component with hero section featuring background image and 20th anniversary badge, plus a 'Meet the Manager' section with profile image and details (truncated).
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: React page component displaying the gym's location in Independence, KY with contact information (phone, email, address), hours (24/7 access), and an embedded Google Maps iframe.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography with Inter and Bebas Neue fonts, container settings, border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural decisions, known issues (incorrect business info, wrong location, placeholder content, pink instead of red colors), and feature implementation status for a fitness facility website requiring real content from Facebook/Yelp sources.
